title: Bedtime
description: Speeds up time when sleeping instead of skipping night.
body:
When enough players sleep, time will now pass at a faster rate. 

## Config

### Percentage
The percentage of players needed to pass the night faster is adjustable with
```
/scoreboard players set $percentage bedtime.config <value>
```
e.g.
```
/scoreboard players set $percentage bedtime.config 50
```
To only require 50% of players to be sleeping to speed up time.

### Rate
The rate at which time passes can be adjusted with 
```
/scoreboard players set $multiplier bedtime.config <value>
```
e.g.
```
/scoreboard players set $multiplier bedtime.config 5
```
To make the night pass 5x faster
